name: structured-code-review
description: Produce rigorous, review-only code review output. Names source of truth (task / design / architecture / feature spec / PRD), tags every finding with severity (High / Medium / Low), cites file paths with line numbers, proposes concrete fixes, and emits a structured no-findings preamble even when nothing is wrong. Composes with domain-review skills (like rest-api-design) — they bring the what-to-flag, this skill brings the how-to-present-it.
